docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARDNER, JOHN NOKIA  GROWTH PARTNERS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2008 - JUDGMENT. (1) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD NG MANAGEMENT CO. AS A DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT NG MANAGEMENT CO. WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. (2) JOHN GARDNER, AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (3) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT ALL WORKING DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED TO HER, WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506) (CLERK FANNY RAYRAY)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.00) SERVED APR-10-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, JOHN NOKIA  GROWTH PARTNERS
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-12-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CONNOR, MARGARET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONNOR, MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG MANAGEMENT CO. $3,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $193.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,643.00, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2008 - JUDGMENT. (1) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD NG MANAGEMENT CO. AS A DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT NG MANAGEMENT CO. WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. (2) JOHN GARDNER, AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (3) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT ALL WORKING DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED TO HER, WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, *SUBJECT TO CHECK CLEARING* AS TO DEFENDANT NG MANAGEMENT CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,150.00 FILED BY CONNOR, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, JOHN NOKIA  GROWTH PARTNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHPREJUDICE AS TO JOHN GARDNER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-12-2008 AT 6:30PM.
